title: CADReasoner: Iterative Program Editing for CAD Reverse Engineering
abstract: A vision-language model that iteratively refines CAD designs by comparing input shapes with reconstructions and modifying based on discrepancies. Outputs a runnable CadQuery Python program whose rendered mesh is fed back at the next step. Combines multi-view renders and point clouds, employs a scan-simulation protocol to bridge realism gaps, and achieves SOTA results across DeepCAD, Fusion 360, and MCB benchmarks.
method_summary: VLM-based iterative self-editing loop: generates CadQuery code, renders it, compares with target point cloud/multi-view images, and refines over multiple iterations using geometric discrepancy feedback.

title: Point2CAD: Reverse Engineering CAD Models from 3D Point Clouds
abstract: Addresses CAD model reconstruction from point clouds with a hybrid analytic-neural reconstruction scheme combined with a novel implicit neural representation for freeform surfaces. Achieves SOTA on the ABC benchmark by recovering accurate edges and corners through analytic intersection of adjacent surfaces.
method_summary: Hybrid analytic-neural pipeline: segments point cloud, fits geometric primitives, uses implicit neural representation for freeform surfaces, and recovers B-rep topology through analytic surface intersection.

title: TransCAD: A Hierarchical Transformer for CAD Sequence Inference from Point Clouds
abstract: Introduces TransCAD, a transformer-based system that generates CAD sequences from point clouds using hierarchical learning and a loop refiner for sketch parameters. Testing on DeepCAD and Fusion360 datasets demonstrates SOTA performance, supported by a new evaluation metric.
method_summary: Hierarchical transformer that leverages CAD sequence structure with a loop refiner to regress sketch primitive parameters from point clouds.

title: ComplexGen: CAD Reconstruction by B-Rep Chain Complex Generation
abstract: Models CAD reconstruction as detecting geometric primitives (vertices, edges, surface patches) and their relationships as a chain complex. Uses sparse CNN encoder and tri-path transformer decoder to generate primitives with probabilities, then recovers B-Rep structure through optimization with structural constraints.
method_summary: Sparse CNN + tri-path transformer decoder detects B-rep primitives and their topological relationships as a chain complex, followed by constrained optimization for definite B-rep recovery.

key_results.status: More accurate detection and constrained reconstruction

title: CAD-Recode: Reverse Engineering CAD Code from Point Clouds
abstract: Translates point clouds into executable Python code that reconstructs CAD models. Uses a small LLM decoder with a point cloud projector, trained on one million procedurally generated CAD sequences. Outperforms existing approaches and enables LLM-based CAD editing and Q&A from point clouds.
method_summary: Point cloud projector + small LLM decoder generates executable Python CAD code from point clouds, trained on 1M procedurally generated sequences.

key_results.status: Outperforms existing approaches on multiple datasets

title: Point2Primitive: CAD Reconstruction from Point Cloud by Direct Primitive Prediction
abstract: Directly predicts explicit parametric primitives of CAD models from point clouds rather than using implicit neural representations. Treats sketch reconstruction as a set prediction problem with transformer-based decoder, formulating curve parameters as explicit position queries optimized autoregressively.
method_summary: Transformer-based set prediction that directly detects and predicts sketch curve types and parameters from point clouds using explicit position queries, avoiding implicit representations.

key_results.status: Superior primitive accuracy and geometric fidelity vs implicit approaches

title: PS-CAD: Local Geometry Guidance via Prompting and Selection for CAD Reconstruction
abstract: Reconstructs CAD modeling sequences step by step with local geometry guidance. At each step provides geometry of surfaces where the current sketch lies and local point cloud geometry as prompts, plus a selection mechanism to choose the best candidate.
method_summary: Step-by-step CAD sequence reconstruction with local geometry prompting (surface geometry + local point cloud) and selection mechanism for candidate evaluation.

title: GACO-CAD: Geometry-Augmented and Conciseness-Optimized CAD Model Generation from Single Image
abstract: Two-stage post-training framework for image-to-CAD: SFT with depth and surface normal maps as geometric priors, then RL with group length reward for compact modeling sequences while maintaining geometric fidelity.
method_summary: SFT with geometric priors (depth + normal maps) followed by RL with group length reward for concise yet accurate CAD generation from single images.

title: View2CAD: Reconstructing View-Centric CAD Models from Single RGB-D Scans
abstract: Reconstructs parametric CAD models from single RGB-D images using a view-centric B-rep representation that handles visibility limits and encodes geometric uncertainty. Combines image segmentation with geometric optimization.
method_summary: View-centric B-rep representation with visibility handling and uncertainty encoding; image segmentation + geometric optimization for partial observation recovery.

key_results.status: Handles partial observations from single views

title: PICASSO: A Feed-Forward Framework for Parametric Inference of CAD Sketches via Rendering Self-Supervision
abstract: Converts CAD sketch images into parametric primitives using rendering self-supervision to pre-train without parameter-level annotations. Comprises Sketch Parameterization Network and differentiable Sketch Rendering Network. Effective in zero- and few-shot scenarios.
method_summary: Feed-forward sketch parameterization with rendering self-supervision: differentiable rendering enables training without parameter annotations for sketch-to-parametric conversion.

title: 3D CAD Model Reconstruction from 2D Sketch using Visual Transformer and Rhino Grasshopper
abstract: Introduces a 3D reconstruction method using visual transformer to predict a scene descriptor from a single wireframe image. The descriptor is then used to generate 3D CAD models through Rhino Grasshopper, producing parametric outputs compatible with CAD software.
method_summary: Visual transformer predicts scene descriptors from wireframe sketches; Rhino Grasshopper generates parametric 3D CAD models from descriptors.

title: CAD2Program: From 2D CAD Drawings to 3D Parametric Models
abstract: Reconstructs 3D parametric models from 2D CAD drawings using VLMs. Encodes 2D drawings as raster images with ViT and auto-regressively generates text describing 3D parametric models. Text-based approach offers greater flexibility than fixed-slot domain-specific sequences.
method_summary: ViT encodes 2D CAD drawings as raster images; auto-regressive text generation describes 3D parametric models, extending to arbitrary geometric entities and semantic properties.

title: Drawing2CAD: Sequence-to-Sequence Learning for CAD Generation from Vector Drawings
abstract: Frames CAD generation from 2D engineering drawings as sequence-to-sequence learning. Features network-friendly vector primitive representation, dual-decoder transformer for decoupling command and parameter generation, and soft target distribution loss. Introduces CAD-VGDrawing dataset.
method_summary: Dual-decoder transformer: one decoder for CAD commands, another for parameters, with soft target distribution loss. Converts vectorized drawing primitives to parametric CAD operations.

title: CAD Sequence and Knowledge Inference from Product Images
abstract: Infers CAD construction sequences and design knowledge from product images. Addresses scenarios where digital CAD files are not accessible, using data-driven reverse engineering approaches to reconstruct both the modeling steps and underlying design intent.
method_summary: Infers CAD construction sequences and design knowledge directly from product photographs, bridging the gap between visual product data and parametric CAD representations.

title: CADMorph: Geometry-Driven Parametric CAD Editing via a Plan-Generate-Verify Loop
abstract: Iterative plan-generate-verify framework for geometry-driven parametric CAD editing. Orchestrates pretrained domain-specific foundation models (P2S latent diffusion + masked-parameter-prediction) to modify CAD sequences while preserving structure and semantic validity. Outperforms GPT-4o and specialized baselines.
method_summary: Plan-Generate-Verify loop: plans edits based on geometry changes, generates modified CAD sequences using pretrained P2S diffusion and masked-parameter models, verifies shape fidelity.

title: CADKnitter: Compositional CAD Generation from Text and Geometry Guidance
abstract: Compositional CAD generation framework producing complementary parts that assemble according to text descriptions and geometric constraints. Releases KnitCAD dataset (310K+ CAD samples with text descriptions and assembly metadata).
method_summary: Geometry-guided diffusion sampling generates complementary CAD parts that fit geometrically with existing parts and align semantically with text prompts.

title: ArtiCAD: Articulated CAD Assembly Design via Multi-Agent Code Generation
abstract: First training-free multi-agent system for generating editable, articulated CAD assemblies from text or images. Four specialized agents with Connector for attachment points and joint parameters. Cross-stage rollback mechanism and self-evolving experience store. Supports URDF export.
method_summary: Multi-agent system: four specialized agents divide assembly design task, Connector predicts attachment points and joint parameters, cross-stage rollback corrects errors, experience store enables self-improvement.

key_results.status: First articulated CAD assembly generation system

title: AADvark: Agent-Aided Design for Dynamic CAD Models
abstract: Agentic system for designing 3D assemblies with moving parts (pistons, scissors, etc.). Captures dynamic part interactions with degrees-of-freedom and integrates constraint solvers with specialized visual feedback for spatial reasoning.
method_summary: Agent-in-the-loop system with code generation, CAD compilation, visualization, and iterative refinement. Integrates constraint solvers for dynamic part interactions with DOF.

key_results.status: First system for dynamic CAD assemblies with moving parts

title: JoinABLe: Learning Bottom-up Assembly of Parametric CAD Joints
abstract: Learning-based method for assembling CAD parts into joints using weak supervision from parametric CAD files. Makes predictions over graph representation of solid models with 79.53% accuracy approaching human performance (80%). Releases Fusion 360 Gallery assembly dataset.
method_summary: Graph neural network over solid model B-rep faces/edges predicts joint types and parameters for bottom-up assembly, using weak supervision from CAD file metadata.
